# Zhouheng Global Finance Mesh __VERSION__

## Highlights

- Apple-style guided console with role-first onboarding and summary-first admin flows
- Tamper-evident SQLite audit ledger with backup + restore drill operations
- Structured multi-host integration: OpenClaw + Claude/Manus/Cursor/Cline/Cherry Studio
- Desktop onboarding alignment: macOS menu bar and Windows tray both land on first-launch guide

## Downloads

- macOS: `.pkg`, `.dmg`, `.zip`
- Windows: `.exe`, `.zip`
- integrity file: `SHA256SUMS`

## Agent host support

- OpenClaw (native plugin)
- Claude (shared MCP)
- Manus (shared MCP)
- Cursor (shared MCP)
- Cline (shared MCP)
- Cherry Studio (shared MCP)

## Known beta limits

- single-instance self-hosting baseline
- local-first integrations (no hosted auth broker in this release)
- no multi-tenant isolation or HA session replication in this release
